name: Chicken w/ Cashews B1
recipeIngredient: 1 to 1-1/2 pounds boned, skinned chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate chicken breasts for 30 minutes in salt, pepper, cornstarch, sherry, and egg.
2. Heat the wok until hot and dry.
3. Add oil. When it's just beginning to smoke, add chicken, green pepper, and water chestnuts. Stir for 1-2 minutes.
4. Drain through a colander or sieve, reserving 2-3 tablespoons of oil.
5. Return the reserved oil to the wok and add Imperial Sauce and hoisin sauce.
6. Cook for 1-2 minutes or until thickened slightly.
7. Add nuts, chicken, and vegetables, stirring everything together until well coated with sauce.
8. Serve.
